options2Fa.description:
- Email OTP - you will receive one-time verification codes to your email address each time you log in.
- Google Authenticator - you will use the Google Authenticator app to generate verification codes on your mobile device.
options2Fa.title: What are the options for two-factor authentication?

whenPointsPaid.description: Points for a reported bug will be awarded after it has been positively reviewed by our team.
whenPointsPaid.title: When will points for a reported bug be awarded?

pointsPerBug.description:
- Minor bugs: {{points1}} points
For small issues that don’t significantly affect the platform’s functionality, but are worth reporting!
- Medium bugs: {{points2}} points
Problems that make using certain features more difficult.
- Critical bugs: {{points3}} points
Report serious issues that affect the overall functionality of the site!
pointsPerBug.title: How many points can you earn for reporting bugs?

whenYouGetPoints.description: Points are awarded to the company linked to the user’s account (if the user has a company account assigned). If you report a bug using an employee account, the points will go to the company’s account. If you don’t have a company account, points will not be awarded.
whenYouGetPoints.title: When are points awarded for reporting a bug?

sendInvoice.description: To send an invoice by email, select the appropriate invoice and click the Send button next to it.
sendInvoice.title: How to send an invoice by email?

changePhone.description: You can change your phone number at most once per day.
changePhone.title: How often can I change my phone number?

confirmPhoneRequired.description: Phone number verification is required to improve user safety, prevent impersonation, and reduce abuse. A verified phone number confirms the authenticity of the user and enables safe contact regarding listings.
confirmPhoneRequired.title: Why is phone number verification required?

phoneVerification.description: Yes. A verified phone number is required to create listings.
phoneVerification.title: Is a verified phone number required to create listings?

updateCard.description: When you add a new payment card and another card is already assigned to your account, the system will automatically update the card information — the new card will replace the old one.
updateCard.title: What happens when I add a new payment card if another one is already assigned to my account?

sendInvoice.description:
To send an invoice by email, select the appropriate invoice and click the Send button next to it.

Note: All invoices are sent to the email address of the company owner.
sendInvoice.title: How to send an invoice by email?

updateDataToInvoice.description: To update your billing details for invoices, click the Update invoice data button located at the bottom of the page below all invoices.
updateDataToInvoice.title: How to update data for future invoices?

changePhone.description: You can change your company's phone number at most once per day.
changePhone.title: How often can I change the company phone number?

confirmPhoneRequired.description: Phone number verification is required to improve user safety, prevent impersonation, and reduce abuse. A verified phone number confirms the authenticity of the company and enables safe contact regarding listings.
confirmPhoneRequired.title: Why is phone number verification required?

locations.description: Yes, the phone number will be visible across all company locations.
locations.title: Will the phone number be visible in all company locations?

phoneVerification.description: Yes. A verified company phone number is required to create listings.
phoneVerification.title: Is a verified phone number required to create listings?

billingPeriod.description: A billing period is a time unit corresponding to one month of subscription use, regardless of the plan type or duration.
billingPeriod.title: What is a billing period?

getPoints.description:
1. Referral system - Recommend our platform to companies and users to earn extra points. To learn more about referrals and statistics, visit the Referral System page on the platform.
  2. Bug reporting - Help us improve the platform by reporting bugs and earn points as a thank-you reward. To learn more about bug reporting, visit our Reported Bugs page, where you’ll find detailed instructions and tips on how to submit effective reports so we can resolve issues faster.
getPoints.title: How can you earn points on the platform?

getSubscriptionFreeDays.description: 1. Exchange points for extra subscription days - You can exchange your earned points for additional subscription days as a reward for your contribution to improving our platform. The extra days will be added to your current billing cycle. To exchange points, click the Exchange points button below.
getSubscriptionFreeDays.title: How can you earn extra free subscription days?

pointsInformation.description: Points on the platform are part of a loyalty system that allows users to earn rewards for various activities. Collected points can be exchanged for additional services, such as SMS packages, to facilitate communication with clients.
pointsInformation.title: What are points used for on the platform?

subscriptionStatus.description: To check your current subscription, go to the Subscriptions section. There, you’ll find all details about your current plan and subscription.
subscriptionStatus.title: Where can you check your current subscription?

locations.description: To change your company’s location points, go to the Company Locations page. There, you can easily add, edit, or remove locations, giving you full control over where your business appears and how it’s shown to clients.
locations.title: Where can you change your company’s location points?

status.description: To check the status of your company profile page for clients and employees, go to the Company Visibility page. There you’ll find all information about visibility settings and profile availability. This allows you to easily control who can see your company page depending on your preferences.
status.title: Where can you check the status of your company profile page?

addCard.description: No, you only need to provide a payment card if none is currently linked to the account or if you wish to update it.
addCard.title: Do I always need to update my payment card when creating a new subscription?

addCoupon.description: Yes, if you have a discount coupon, you can apply it while creating a new subscription to receive extra benefits.
addCoupon.title: Can I enter a discount coupon when creating a new subscription?

cardError.description: If there’s an issue with your card that prevents the subscription from starting, an appropriate error message will be displayed.
cardError.title: What happens if my card is declined when trying to start a subscription?

validCoupon.description: If an invalid discount coupon is entered, the subscription activation will be rejected, and an error message will appear.
validCoupon.title: What happens if an invalid discount coupon is entered when creating a new subscription?

freeSubscriptionDaysWithoutSubscription.description: No, to add extra free subscription days, you must have an active subscription that is not expiring, unpaid, or in a trial period.
freeSubscriptionDaysWithoutSubscription.title: Can extra subscription days be added if there’s no active subscription?

maximumSubscriptions.description: Only one subscription can be active at a time.
maximumSubscriptions.title: How many subscriptions can be active at once?

newSubscriptionOnActiveFreeTrial.description: Yes, you can activate a new subscription during a free trial. The trial will be canceled, and the new subscription will start immediately.
newSubscriptionOnActiveFreeTrial.title: Can I activate a new subscription during the free trial period?

replacePointsToFreeDaysInSubscription.description: To exchange points for additional free subscription days, go to the Exchange Points page, select the desired conversion rate, and complete the exchange. Extra days are added only once per current billing period.
replacePointsToFreeDaysInSubscription.title: How can you exchange points for additional free subscription days?

permissionInformation.description: 1. Employee management - allows adding, editing, and removing employees, as well as managing their permissions and schedules.
permissionInformation.title: What permissions can be assigned to an employee?
